zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：震荡偏多格局延续
zh.content:
价格位于1584上方，略高于20日均线1574附近，日内涨幅0.57%，整体呈窄幅整理后偏多运行结构，短线多头占优但动能有限

MACD指标为正值0.92，显示多头动能仍在延续，但信号线未完整给出，动能释放偏温和；RSI缺失但从结构看处于中性偏强区间，未现超买风险

下方支撑关注1574均线与1576日内低点，跌破或回测1550区域；上方阻力在1588前高，突破后有望上看1605一线压力，需观察量能配合

操作建议以区间交易为主，未突破前高前谨慎追多；若放量突破1588可顺势做多，止损设1574下方以控制回撤风险，适合短线波段操作

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is currently consolidating in a tight intraday range around 1584, showing a mild bullish bias after a modest 0.57% gain. Price action remains compressed between 1576 and 1588, indicating equilibrium between buyers and sellers. The structure suggests a short-term accumulation phase following prior volatility. With price holding above the 20-period SMA at 1574.61, the broader micro-trend leans cautiously positive, though momentum lacks strong directional expansion.

The MACD reading at 0.92 signals underlying bullish momentum, suggesting buyers retain short-term control despite limited volatility. Although RSI data is unavailable, price behavior above the 20-period SMA reinforces a neutral-to-bullish momentum regime rather than overbought conditions. The absence of signal line detail limits precision, yet histogram strength implies gradual upward pressure. Overall, momentum indicators favor continuation rather than reversal in the current consolidation structure.

Immediate support is established at the 20-SMA near 1574.6, with secondary support at the recent low of 1576.0 acting as a short-term floor. On the upside, resistance is seen at 1588.3, aligned with the intraday high, followed by a psychological barrier near 1600. A sustained break above resistance would signal renewed bullish expansion, while failure to hold support may trigger corrective retracement toward lower consolidation zones.

Traders may consider range-bound strategies, buying near support at the 1574–1576 zone and targeting resistance at 1588 with partial profit-taking. A breakout strategy becomes relevant only on a confirmed close above 1588, ideally with rising volume confirmation. Risk management is key, with stops placed below 1570 to avoid whipsaws. Until directional expansion occurs, ETH remains in a consolidation phase favoring disciplined short-term positioning.
